# MessageComposeResult.sent

**Case**

The user successfully queued or sent the message.

## Declaration

```swift
case sent
```

## Constants

- **MessageComposeResult.cancelled**: The user canceled the composition.
- **MessageComposeResult.failed**: The user’s attempt to save or send the message was unsuccessful.

items.description: The user’s attempt to save or send the message was unsuccessful.
